description: Style NoteThe Energise fragrance for men by hugo boss has a citrusy burst which mellows down to long lasting musk. It comes in an interesting flacon and is best recommended for evening wearProduct DetailsThe top notes are light and warm with kumquat, mandarin and pink pepper. The heart notes balance the top notes with juniper berry and corriander. It ends with jacaranda wood and suede as its base notes.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize75 ml
